programme.title: Ana Ma'Ak
programme.desc: Set in Gwalior, Ana Ma'ak follows Jhanvi, a single mom doing life on hard mode while keeping her son Kian at the center of her universe. Aryaman, heir to a thriving hotel empire, wants nothing to do with his family business thanks to a rocky relationship with his father. Fate throws Jhanvi and Aryaman into the same workplace, where he meets Kian - and an unexpected, heart-melting bond starts to form between them.
